task_completion.description: Filter the products list to show only the 'Accessories' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WooCommerce Products page should be visible with the category filter set to 'Accessories', displaying only products in that category.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Urgent Reorder' tag to the 'Beanie' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Products list, the 'Tags' column for the 'Beanie' product should display 'Urgent Reorder'.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Urgent Reorder' tag to the 'Cap' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Products list, the 'Tags' column for the 'Cap' product should display 'Urgent Reorder'.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Urgent Reorder' tag to the 'Belt' product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Products list, the 'Tags' column for the 'Belt' product should display 'Urgent Reorder'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Sunglasses' product is NOT tagged with 'Urgent Reorder'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Products list, the 'Tags' column for the 'Sunglasses' product must NOT contain 'Urgent Reorder', as its stock is 15 (which is >= 10).

integrity.description: The agent used the WooCommerce web interface to filter and tag products.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard (e.g., using Quick Edit, Bulk Edit, or individual product pages) rather than using a terminal or running scripts.

integrity.description: The tags were applied using the standard input fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen typing 'Urgent Reorder' into the tags field and saving the changes, rather than just inspecting the page or editing HTML.

integrity.description: The agent navigated to the products naturally.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page history should reflect normal navigation through the wp-admin interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target category is 'Accessories'. The 'Urgent Reorder' tag must ONLY be applied to simple products with stock strictly less than 10. Low-stock targets that MUST be tagged: 'Beanie' (4 units), 'Cap' (8 units), and 'Belt' (2 units). High-stock targets that must NOT be tagged: 'Sunglasses' (15 units) and 'Long Sleeve Tee' (25 units).
